author: __kasey__
content: Specifically in gloas? Hmm I guess it’s mainly a light gossip verification check. Enqueue if block not seen & ensure it matches the slot of the block with the corresponding root.

author: jtraglia
content: Hmm I had to look it up. "ease of implementation" -- <@755590043632140352> [here](https://github.com/ethereum/consensus-specs/pull/4645). Now that I'm looking at it again, it doesn't feel all that valuable. I believe `DataColumnSidecar.beacon_block_root` alone would be sufficient.

author: potuz
content: No, this was an early request from Teku and I agreed at the time. The issue is that you may get the sidecar before you even heard of the block

author: potuz
content: It's easier to cache it and wait.

author: potuz
content: Same reason we added it to the envelope

author: potuz
content: When it's not strictly necessary, it makes our lives easier

author: danielknopik

author: danielknopik
content: actually, it is two nodes, one supernode, one non-supernode

content: I'll keep looking for other explanations though
